structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-07-30 Home in Five Advantage 7-Year Forgivable Loan Options Returning
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-07-30 11:15:39-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

The Maricopa Home in 5 Advantage program is bringing back the seven-year forgivable second mortgage options with down payment assistance ranging from 3%-6% when combined with a first mortgage, starting August 1st, 2025!

PROGRAM DETAILS

*	Income may not exceed 120% of AMI, currently at $131,520. 
*	Must be a FTHB (buyers who have not owned a residential property in the last three years).
*	Must be residents of Arizona and have been for a minimum of six months.
*	Loans provide principal forgiveness of 1/84th per full month.

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Please see the Conventional Matrix, Government Matrix, DPA Guidelines, and rate sheet (to be updated as of August 1), linked here <https://homein5advantage.com/resources-for-lenders/> , for details for both the first and second loans on the seven-year forgivable second loan options. 

 

For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  

For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 

For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
